_description: Simple handbook policy question — the most common query type

tenant_config.companyTone: Warm and professional. First names are fine.

handbook_excerpt:
Holiday Entitlement and Carry-Over Policy

All full-time employees are entitled to 25 days annual leave plus 8 public holidays. Part-time employees receive a pro-rated entitlement.

Carry-Over: Employees may carry over a maximum of 5 days unused holiday into the following leave year. These carried-over days must be used by 31 March of the new leave year or they are forfeited. Requests to carry over more than 5 days require written approval from the HR Lead and a valid business reason.

Booking: Holiday requests must be submitted via Breathe HR with a minimum of 2 weeks notice for requests up to 5 days, and 4 weeks notice for longer periods. All requests are subject to operational requirements and manager approval.
